docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY BENDER, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT TRIMBLE, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRIMBLE, DENNIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENDER, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIMBLE, DENNIS $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00, PLTF WILL RECEIVE FULL SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFT NOT ENTITLED TO SECURITY DEPOSIT OFFSET FOR DEFICIENCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO RICHARD BENDER RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
